approved_setups.name: Opening Range Breakout
approved_setups.description: Price breaks the first 5- or 15-minute range with volume.

approved_setups.name: VWAP Reclaim
approved_setups.description: Price reclaims VWAP after weakness and holds above it.

approved_setups.name: VWAP Pullback
approved_setups.description: Trending stock pulls back to VWAP and holds without breaking trend.

approved_setups.name: News Momentum
approved_setups.description: Liquid stock moves on a fresh catalyst and strong volume.

approved_setups.name: Failed Breakdown Reversal
approved_setups.description: Price breaks support then quickly reclaims it, trapping sellers.
